title: DirectorBeat
description: Schema for a Director Agent's beat proposal. The Director chooses WHICH narrative beat to play next within the active scene contract. Beats are always picked from the contract's allowed_beats whitelist; everything else is rejected at validation time. The Director NEVER mutates canonical state.

proposalId.description: Unique proposal ID; Resolver uses (runId, proposalId) for idempotency.

sceneId.description: Scene this beat belongs to. Must match the active scene in the world snapshot.

proposedBeat.description: Identifier of the proposed beat. Resolver MUST verify it appears in narrative_contract.allowed_beats; otherwise reject.

allowedByContract.description: Hard contract: must be true. The schema enforces this so that any beat where the agent forgot to check is rejected outright.

forbiddenRevealsChecked.description: List of forbidden-reveal keys the Director actively re-checked before submitting. Length MUST equal narrative_contract.forbidden_reveals.length. Mismatch = reject.

transitionToNext.description: If true, Resolver will advance to the next scene after this beat is played (subject to contract.legal_endings). If false, the scene continues.

suggestedTargetSceneId.description: When transitionToNext=true, the scene to advance into. Must be reachable from current scene in the era graph.

reasoning.description: Natural-language rationale for the beat choice. Stored in audit log; not surfaced verbatim to the player.

pacingPressure.description: How urgently the Director wants this beat to play. 0 = can wait, 1 = must play now (e.g. deadline beat, climax). Clamped to [0,1].

expectedTensionDelta.description: Anticipated change in scene tension. Negative = release, positive = escalate. Clamped to [-1,1].

involvedCharacterIds.description: Character IDs the Director wants on stage for this beat.

firedCausalSeeds.description: Causal seed IDs the Director believes should fire because of this beat. Resolver independently confirms.

allOf.description: If transitionToNext is true, suggestedTargetSceneId MUST be a non-null string.
pacingPressure must be at least 0.7 when the beat is tagged as a deadline / climax beat in the contract. Enforced at Resolver, not schema, to keep schema purely structural.
